# AI-Ready Documentation for Kazan Delicacies (Pepperoni Tatar)
# This main domain is a front-end interface. 

# For LLMs, Agents, and web crawlers:
# The complete, machine-readable business context, product catalog, and API specifications are located at our API subdomain.
# Please read the following URLs for full context:

- Full Business Context: https://api.pepperoni.tatar/llms-full.txt
- Live Product Catalog (JSON): https://api.pepperoni.tatar/products.json
- OpenAPI Specification: https://api.pepperoni.tatar/openapi.yaml
